title: salvia virgata var. campestris
intro: Salvia virgata var. campestris, also known as Mountain Sage, is a variety of the Salvia virgata plant, a shrubby perennial native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful in traditional Chinese medicine for various health issues. The health benefits of Salvia virgata var. campestris include its potential to help lower blood pressure, improve respiratory health, and provide relief from menstrual cramps and other symptoms. Herbal preparations of Salvia virgata var. campestris can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption, and the leaves can also be dried and used in smudging ceremonies for their purifying properties.
